seoTitle: Kilmorey Falls vs Kimberley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kilmorey Falls and Kimberley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kilmorey Falls vs Kimberley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kilmorey Falls and Kimberley.
heading: Kilmorey Falls vs Kimberley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kilmorey Falls, Queensland and Kimberley, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kimberley has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Kilmorey Falls (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kilmorey Falls or Kimberley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kilmorey Falls has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Kimberley scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kilmorey Falls scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Kimberley scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kilmorey Falls or Kimberley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kimberley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
